Profile.nme: No Root Screen Off Data Enabled
No Root Screen Off BT Disconnected
Bottom "Buffer" Profile. Not To Be Used
screen On No Lock No Low Power

Vals.Title: .*([Ff]inish|[Cc]omplete|[Dd]one).*
Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.extras.VARI: InterceptApps Title Text InterceptPersistent CategoryName plugininstanceid plugintypeid

Share.d:
You can check the status of the mobile data with this task: ON or OFF.
Notes: - If the name of the Custom Setting (also table) is different, customize it using the one for your device.

Profile.pc: at boot, disable any & all global var & settings toggling profiles, check conditions & set global variables accordingly

Profile.nme: (Un)Set Sim Presence Airplane Mode via Automate

Condition.rhs: .*(Net Set \(User\)|Wan Check Switch|Ping Test|Redundant Net Src).*

Profile.nme: Mobile Data Var Set via Automate

Share.d:
You can check the status of the mobile data with this task: ON or OFF.
Notes: - If the name of the Custom Setting (also table) is different, customize it using the one for your device.

Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%bt_address Address Bluetooth device's MAC address</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1>%bt_alias Alias Optional bluetooth device's user given name</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2>%bt_battery_level Battery Level % of battery available, or not set if unavailable. (Android 9+)</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3>%bt_class Class The device's bluetooth class ID</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4>%bt_class_name Class Name The device's bluetooth class name</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES5>%bt_connected Connected true if the BT device is connected, false otherwise</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES5><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES6>%bt_encrypted Encrypted true if there is at least one encrypted connection to this device, false otherwise</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES6><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES7>%bt_major_class Major Class The device's major bluetooth class ID</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES7><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES8>%bt_major_class_name Major Class Name The device's major bluetooth class name</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES8><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES9>%bt_name Name Bluetooth device's name</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES9><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES10>%bt_paired Paired true if the BT device is paired with your phone, false otherwise</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES10><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES11>%bt_signal_strength Signal Strength Strength of the connection in dBm. Only available for connected and scanned devices.</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES11><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES12>%bt_type Type Could be 'classic', 'le', 'dual' or 'unknown'</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES12></StringArray>

Action.Str: unsetting fg net app flags after %pause_time%null()s
Either a voice synthesis engine isn't installed or not configured

Install a TTS engine (if none available, like Google's TTS) Test the say action with available options offered by the action's "engine:voice" arg. Edit the SAY_TTS_ENGINE_VOICE variable in the "Lazy Workflow Initializer" (action 1) with whatever worked

Task.nme: Screen & Lock State Low Power Profile Toggle

Action.Str: screen On No Lock No Low Power
Wan Check Switch,Redundant Net Src,Ping Test,Net Set,Net Src Disconnected Switch,Net Unset,Net Set (User)
Wan Check Switch,Redundant Net Src,Ping Test,Net Set,Net Src Disconnected Switch,Net Unset,Net Set (User)
Toggle Data,Wan Check,Redundant Net Src Switch,Net Src Switch,Ping Test
screen On No Lock No Low Power
screen On No Lock No Low Power

Task.pc: use say or flash based on screen & or lock state to post msgs

Action.label: (Automate flo) "Tasker - settings & states checks": "Cellular Data state"
(Automate flo) "Tasker - settings & states checks": "Sim Presence"

Condition.rhs: *(Un)Set Sim Presence Airplane Mode via Automate*

Action.label: (Automate flo) "Tasker - settings & states checks": "Hotspot state"

Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%new_state New State true if it after the action the setting is enabled, false if not</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0></StringArray>

Action.label: toggle between automate (in)dependent profiles (for cellular data state)
(Automate flo) "Tasker - settings & states checks": "Cellular Data state"
toggle between automate (in)dependent profiles (for wifi hotspot state)
(Automate flo) "Tasker - settings & states checks": "Hotspot state"
toggle to use automate or let the profile handle the wifi connection state (for wifi connection state)
(Automate flo) "Tasker - settings & states checks": "Wifi state"

Action.Str: Re-enable "wifi var set" profile or disable it & run "Wi-Fi state" flow beginning from the "Tasker - settings & states checks" flow or set the variable "%WIFI_CONNECTED" to the appropriate value (yes/no)

Action.label: toggle between automate (in)dependent profiles

Action.Str: Enable/Disable one of "Mobile Data Var Set" or "Mobile Data Var Set Via Automate" profiles or set the variable value as "enabled/disabled" in the vars section of the project (MDATA)

Action.label: toggle between automate (in)dependent profiles (for sim based airplane mode)

Condition.rhs: *(Un)Set Sim Presence Airplane Mode via Automate*

Action.label: (Automate flo) "Tasker - settings & states checks": "Sim Presence"

Condition.rhs: .*(Un)Set Sim Presence Airplane Mode(,| via Automate).*
.*(Un)Set Sim Presence Airplane Mode(,| via Automate).*

Action.Str: Enable/Disable one of "(Un)Set Sim Presence Airplane Mode" or "(Un)Set Sim Presence Airplane Mode via Automate" profiles

Action.label: Automate - Battery noise: Plugged in battery full
stop automate flow
start automate flow/flow beginning

Condition.rhs: .*(Net Set \(User\)|Wan Check Switch|Ping Test|Redundant Net Src).*

Action.Str: if echo "%PACTIVE" | grep -q "auto set Work Profile" then for i in "$(echo "%PACTIVE" | sed 's/,/\n/g' | grep -i "auto set work profile")" do echo ,"$i" done fi

Action.label: enable sensors

Action.Str: Failed to toggle dev mode sensors

Action.label: enable sensors
enable sensors
disable sensors

Action.Str: Failed to toggle dev mode sensors

Action.label: disable sensors
disable sensors

Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%bi_level 01. Level The current battery level, from 0 to scale</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1>%bi_scale 02. Scale The maximum battery level</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2>%bi_status 03. Status 1=Unknown; 2=Charging; 3=Discharging; 4=Not Charging; 5=Full;</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3>%bi_status_string 04. Status Description </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4>%bi_temperature 05. Temperature Current battery temperature in degree Celsius. May always show as 0 on some devices.</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES4><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES5>%bi_power_source 06. Power Source 1=AC; 2=USB; 4=Wireless; 8=Dock;</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES5><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES6>%bi_power_source_string 07. Power Source Description </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES6><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES7>%bi_health 08. Battery Health 1=Unknown; 2=Good; 3=Overheat; 4=Dead; 5=Over Voltage; 6=Failure;</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES7><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES8>%bi_time_until_charged 08. Time Until Charged Approximate time (MS) remaining until the battery is fully charged or -1 if not possible to get</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES8><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES9>%bi_health_string 09. Battery Health Description </_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES9><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES10>%bi_battery_low 10. Battery Low true if device battery level is low (corresponds to the Low battery warning system dialog), false otherwise</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES10><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES11>%bi_voltage 11. Voltage Current battery voltage in millivolts</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES11><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES12>%bi_present 12. Present true if device has a battery, false otherwise</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES12><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES13>%bi_technology 13. Technology Description of the technology of the current battery</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES13><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES14>%bi_capacity_percentage 14. Capacity Percentage Remaining battery capacity percentage</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES14><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES15>%bi_capacity 15. Capacity Battery capacity in microampere-hours</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES15><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES16>%bi_current_average 16. Average Current Average battery current in microamperes. Can be positive (charging) or negative (discharging)</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES16><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES17>%bi_current_now 17. Instantaneous Current Instantaneous battery current in microamperes. Can be positive (charging) or negative (discharging)</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES17><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES18>%bi_energy_counter 18. Energy Counter Battery remaining energy in nanowatt-hours</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES18><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES19>%bi_adaptive_charging_enabled 19. Adaptive Charging Enabled true if adaptive charging is enabled on your device, false if not. May not be correct on all devices.</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES19><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES20>%bi_manufacturing_date 19. Battery Manufacturing Date Seconds Since Epoch</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES20><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES21>%bi_adaptive_battery_management_enabled 20. Adaptive Battery Enabled true if the "Adaptive Battery" setting is enabled on your phone, false if not. May not be correct on all devices.</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES21><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES22>%bi_first_usage_date 20. Battery First Usage Date Seconds Since Epoch</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES22><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES23>%bi_charging_policy 21. Battery Charging Policy 1=Default; 2=Adaptive Static; 3=Adaptive Dynamic; 4=Adaptive Long Life;</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES23><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES24>%bi_state_of_health 22. Battery State of Health Percentage representing the measured battery state of health (remaining estimated full charge capacity relative to the rated capacity in %)</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES24></StringArray>

Action.label: Automate - Battery noise: Plugged in battery full
Automate - Battery noise: Plugged in battery full
annoy the user to unlock the phone & disable bluetooth

Action.Str: /sdcard/Ringtones/hey-humans-time-to-get-a-new-monster-because-this-one-sucks.mp3,/sdcard/Ringtones/elite_angry_2.mp3,/sdcard/Ringtones/halo.mp3,/sdcard/Ringtones/elite_short_tough_guy.mp3,/sdcard/Ringtones/halo infinite grunt suck even worse.mp3,/sdcard/Ringtones/halo infinite grunt idiot joke.mp3

Power Connected,Power Disconnected,Phone Shutdown Audio,Unplugged 1 Pcent Battery,Unplugged 2 Pcent Battery,Battery Audios,Battery Full Audio Event

Action.Str: Power Connected,Power Disconnected,Phone Shutdown Audio,Unplugged 1 Pcent Battery,Unplugged 2 Pcent Battery,Battery Audios,Battery Full Audio Event
Power Connected,Power Disconnected,Phone Shutdown Audio,Unplugged 1 Pcent Battery,Unplugged 2 Pcent Battery,Battery Audios,Battery Full Audio Event

Action.label: Disable profiles meant for readability only
stop automate flow
call cut
(stop Automate flo) "Tasker - settings & states checks"

Action.Str: Mobile Data Var Set,(Un)Set Sim Presence Airplane Mode

Action.label: Disable the profiles that have Automate dependent counter parts & itself
Action.Str: wifi var set,Wifi Hotspot State,%xor_profile_ls(+,),%xor_profile_ls(+ via Automate,) via Automate

Action.label: Enable Automate dependent counter parts & some automate independent profiles
Action.Str: wifi var set,(Un)Set Sim Presence Airplane Mode via Automate,Mobile Data Var Set via Automate,Wifi Hotspot State

Action.label: (Automate flo) "Tasker - settings & states checks": "Sim Presence"
(Automate flo) "Tasker - settings & states checks": "Cellular Data state"
stop if change to ssid & iface is rejected
when settings stat says wan is reachable

Action.Str: wan iface switch count limit reached
wan iface switch count limit reached
wan iface switch count limit reached

Action.label: prompt to ask to stop WAN checker if switch count is more than 4 & wan is stable

Action.Str: WAN switch toggle count reset to 0

Action.label: when settings stat says wan is unreachable

Action.Str: WAN src disabled: stopping wan checker

Action.label: switch ssid if selected "yes" from above prompt & then check the wan system stat again (the goto action at action 12)

Action.Str: No Root Screen Off BT Disconnected
Net Set,Net Unset,Net Src Disconnected Switch,Wan Check Switch,Ping Test

Action.label: audio dbg
audio dbg
disable all networking based profiles
Action.Str: Net Set (User),Net Set,Wan Check Switch,Ping Test,Net Src Disconnected Switch,Redundant Net Src,Net Unset,Bluetooth Set,Bluetooth Unset

Action.label: to be passed to lazy workflow initializer task to initialize some global vars
initialize workflow
enable all networking based profiles
Action.Str: Net Set (User),Net Set,Wan Check Switch,Ping Test,Net Src Disconnected Switch,Redundant Net Src,Net Unset,Bluetooth Set,Bluetooth Unset

Action.label: use only WiFi if no sim
if connection NOT made disable wifi & enable data
net src set to mdata
if connection made
disable data (if wifi connected)
set data src to wifi
do the redundant net switching when sim is available

Action.Str: No Sim. Wait 20s or until conn before disabling WiFi
disable airplane mode for redundant data usage. Only wifi used for now
No WiFi conn made after 20s. disabling

Action.label: enable data when conn not made

Action.Str: dir_path=/storage/emulated/0/Tasker/log for i in runlog tasker do for j in log txt do [ -f $dir_path/$i.$j ] && echo > $dir_path/$i.$j [ $dir_path/$i.$j.1 ] && rm -f $dir_path/$i.$j.1 done done

Action.label: toggle for when the profile's active but the task isn't running (yes it's happened a couple of times)

Action.Str: bg loc flag set & loc enabled

Action.label: don't act on anything data when sim is either not in ready state or not present

Action.Str: Cannot toggle data. Airplane mode enabled
No Root Screen Off Data Enabled

Action.label: if bluetooth ui mode is running, wait for it to finish

Vals.com.twofortyfouram.locale.intent.extra.B:
Actions To Perform: click(id,com.android.settings:id/switch_btn)
back() Not In AutoInput: true Not In Tasker: true Separator: , Pre-Action Delay: 1000 Check Millis: 1500
Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%ailastbounds Last Bounds Bounds (left,top,right,bottom) of the item that the action last interacted with</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1>%ailastcoordinates Last Coordinates Center coordinates (x,y) of the item that the action last interacted with</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2>%err Error Code Only available if you select <b>Continue Task After Error</b> and the action ends in error</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3>%errmsg Error Message Only available if you select <b>Continue Task After Error</b> and the action ends in error</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3></StringArray>

Vals.com.twofortyfouram.locale.intent.extra.B: Actions To Perform: click(id,com.android.settings:id/switch_btn) Not In AutoInput: true Not In Tasker: true Separator: , Pre-Action Delay: 1000 Check Millis: 1500
Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%ailastbounds Last Bounds Bounds (left,top,right,bottom) of the item that the action last interacted with</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1>%ailastcoordinates Last Coordinates Center coordinates (x,y) of the item that the action last interacted with</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2>%err Error Code Only available if you select <b>Continue Task After Error</b> and the action ends in error</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3>%errmsg Error Message Only available if you select <b>Continue Task After Error</b> and the action ends in error</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3></StringArray>

All cores set to max freq & perf gov

All cores set to schedutil gov & P cores to min freq

Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%new_state New State true if it after the action the setting is enabled, false if not</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0></StringArray>

Set installed app %installed_app_name in the relevant/needed (net/bluetooth/map) profile's app context of needed (pkg - %installed_pkg_name)
%installed_app_name installed, consists of requests for %str. set app in tasker lazy workflow project if needed
Ping values unset. Stopped ping test

No Root Screen Off BT Disconnected

Vals.com.twofortyfouram.locale.intent.extra.B: Actions To Perform: click(text,Bluetooth) Not In AutoInput: true Not In Tasker: true Separator: , Pre-Action Delay: 1000 Check Millis: 1500
Vals.net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VA: <StringArray sr=""><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0>%ailastbounds Last Bounds Bounds (left,top,right,bottom) of the item that the action last interacted with</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES0><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1>%ailastcoordinates Last Coordinates Center coordinates (x,y) of the item that the action last interacted with</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES1><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2>%err Error Code Only available if you select <b>Continue Task After Error</b> and the action ends in error</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES2><_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3>%errmsg Error Message Only available if you select <b>Continue Task After Error</b> and the action ends in error</_array_net.dinglisch.android.tasker.RELEVANT_VARIABLES3></StringArray>

Action.label: tasker toggle if shizuku/root available, taskersettings work or sdk lvl < 32

Action.Str: No Root Screen Off BT Disconnected
%BLUE Bluetooth left enabled. Unlock to disable
No Root Screen Off BT Disconnected

Action.label: bi_status values from action 2

Action.Str: No Root Screen Off Data Enabled
